title: Northwind Home
excerpt: Scaled a homeware brand from launch to 7 figures on Amazon.
description: We rebuilt this homeware brand's Seller Central from the ground up — new A+ content, a restructured catalog and a profit-focused PPC program that tripled revenue in nine months.

title: Vintage Loft
excerpt: Turned a hobby eBay store into a full-time business.
description: Bulk-listing automation, SEO-rich titles and a tuned Promoted Listings strategy took this reseller from a few sales a week to consistent daily order volume.

title: Maker & Moss
excerpt: Helped a handmade brand hit Star Seller status.
description: A full shop rebrand, listing-SEO overhaul and disciplined Etsy Ads management lifted conversion and earned this maker Star Seller status within two quarters.

title: Brightline Tech
excerpt: A custom Shopify store that doubled conversion rate.
description: We designed and built a fast, branded Shopify storefront, wired in every marketplace, and ran a CRO program that doubled the store's conversion rate at launch.

title: Glow Collective
excerpt: Launched a beauty brand to viral TikTok sales.
description: We set up TikTok Shop, recruited an affiliate creator network and ran LIVE shopping events that turned a new beauty brand into a repeatable, viral revenue channel.

title: Harbor Goods
excerpt: Unified five channels under one managed program.
description: We consolidated Amazon, eBay and Shopify into one managed, synced program — protecting margins, the brand and inventory while doubling total order volume.
